---
title: "TRSE units: VIC20"
description: Bundled Turbo Rascal unit files (.tru) shipped with TRSE
---

# VIC20

These paths are relative to `units/VIC20/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `cart/cart`
- `cart/crtcompression`
- `gfx/gfx`
- `input/key`
- `output/csp`
- `output/lbm8`
- `output/pbm`
- `screen`
- `trtplayer`
